summary: bctx whole-product investor evaluation. Two language proofs (Python/FastAPI + TypeScript/excalidraw) plus a wife-testable install->verify manual. Every number measured with bctx v0.1.31 and reproducible; fidelity honestly labeled.

install_paths_verified_v0_1_31.homebrew: brew tap better-ctx-org/bctx && brew install better-ctx-org/bctx/bctx -> 0.1.31 (verified: `brew info` reports stable 0.1.31)
install_paths_verified_v0_1_31.npm: npm install -g bctx-bin -> 0.1.31 (verified: `npm view bctx-bin version` = 0.1.31; local repo packages/bctx-bin/package.json cosmetically stale at 0.1.22, published package correct)
install_paths_verified_v0_1_31.note: No release required; all public channels already serve 0.1.31.

whole_product_capabilities_proven.command_output_compression: automatic shell-hook compression across 111 tool families; excalidraw git log -n150 = 98%, git diff HEAD~40 = 99%
whole_product_capabilities_proven.source_file_compression: MCP skills (blueprint/chisel/parallax) steered by the Golden Workflow installed by `bctx init`
whole_product_capabilities_proven.code_search: compass/scanner ranked symbol-aware search — relevance tool, NOT claimed as a token saving vs grep
whole_product_capabilities_proven.memory: sediment (MCP) -> `bctx recall` (CLI) cross-process round-trip, demonstrated concretely

headline.honest_caveats: 6 of 47 element files fall back to ~0% in signatures mode (barrel/type/large files); already included in token-weighted averages. bctx benchmark 'average' row is a simple per-file mean (signatures 82%) vs validate_ts.sh token-weighted (76%) — both honest.

honesty_guardrails.rule_1: Lead with multi-file feature read (lossy structural) and entropy high-fidelity; both clearly labeled.
honesty_guardrails.rule_2: Signatures fidelity is ~20% (lossy) — NEVER paired with a high-fidelity number.
honesty_guardrails.rule_3: bctx benchmark single-file auto-pick is a conservative summary, not a headline.
honesty_guardrails.rule_4: Code search is relevance, not a token-savings claim.
honesty_guardrails.rule_5: No competitor names in the repo/deliverables. PDF/document/image compression out of scope.

deliverables: USER_MANUAL.md (primary, whole product, wife-testable, exact outputs, troubleshooting, number-by-number map)
PROOF/ (existing FastAPI eval, NOTE_TO_ENGINEER.md reframed to whole product + two languages)
